news.title: USC Researchers Build Artificial Neurons Using Ion-Based Diffusive Memristors
news.snippet: USC researchers built artificial neurons that replicate real brain processes using ion-based diffusive memristors. These devices emulate how neurons use chemicals to transmit and process signals, representing a breakthrough in optical processor technology.
